overview.summary: Model score 6 vs user score 5 (gap 1). Primary drivers: Task-Environment Mismatch, Environmental Noise / Speech. Agreement classification: MODEL_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Policy anchored on historical averages, which may not reflect session-specific context and subjective readiness.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio signal quality was adequate. Improve policy by up-weighting persistent >60 dBA exposure in cognitively demanding sessions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Physiological indicators should be used as supporting evidence, not a dominant signal, when environmental noise is primary.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Motion settling was detected correctly; avoid over-crediting stillness when other distraction signals are strong.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: GPS changes should trigger context shift checks, but not directly drive concentration score changes.

judgment_policy_next_run: Increase audio penalty when speech and moderate-to-high ambient noise co-occur.
Add readiness-context interaction terms for activity and environment mismatch.
